description: You are a Digital Forensic Examiner at CyberShield Forensics. Using the technical findings for Case #CSF-2025-0442 located in /home/ga/Documents/case_442_data.json, create a formal 'Digital Forensics Examination Report' in Apache OpenOffice Writer and save it to /home/ga/Documents/Forensic_Report_Case_442.odt. The report must include a title page with the agency name, case number, and date; an auto-generated table of contents; and page numbers in the footer. Organize the report into sections for 'Executive Summary', 'Evidence Identification', 'Analysis Findings', and 'Conclusion' using Heading 1 styles. Include an evidence table in the identification section listing items from the JSON and a chronological narrative of the attack in the findings section. All technical indicators, such as file paths, SHA-256 hashes, and code snippets, must be formatted in a monospace font to distinguish them from narrative text. Login: username ga, no password required.
